en.hero_sub: AI signals across 350 assets — crypto, stocks, ETFs, futures, commodities, bonds and forex — in 8 languages. Real-time data from 7 global markets, in your pocket.
en.b3_para: AUREX is the market-tracking terminal that sits between you and your broker. It doesn't execute trades. It doesn't manage your money. It gives you the full picture — technical data, macro signals, geopolitical events and global sentiment — so every decision you make is an informed one.
en.b3_bullet2: 7 global stock markets: USA, Argentina, Brazil, Spain, Europe, Japan and China
en.b3_bullet3: Available on iOS, Android and browser. No setup required.
en.b4_sub: 375 assets visible in real time in the Markets tab. More added with every release — 350 is the current selection, not the ceiling.
en.b5_subheading: Most apps give you a score. AUREX shows you the math.
en.b5_col1: Each signal is the result of 10 independent quantitative variables: 24h trend, RSI14, relative volume, volatility, BTC/SPY correlation, Gold/Oil correlation, FED macro data, earnings calendar, MACD 12/26, and 30-day support/resistance.
en.b5_col2: Pulse reads the global market context in real time: BTC price, dominance and variation, ETH, VIX, S&P500, 4 US futures (ES, NQ, YM, RTY), Gold, Silver, Oil, Copper, FED Macro and GDELT Geopolitics.
en.b5_highlight: FED macro data feeds into every individual signal — not just a global gauge. GDELT geopolitical events cross-reference directly against each asset's signal. No retail competitor does this.
en.b6_heading: The full market picture. Always visible.
en.b6_b1: 11 global exchanges — see open, closed and pre/post-market status in real time. Choose which markets to display and in what order.
en.b6_b2: 16 instruments across 6 categories: Indices, Energy, Metals, Forex, Bonds and Crypto. Know where the market is heading before it opens.
en.b6_b3: A live scrolling ticker of high and medium-impact economic events — FOMC, CPI, payrolls, geopolitical developments — active right now.
en.b6_close: The global market state. One screen. No app switching.
en.b7_heading: Your holdings. With the full AI engine on top.
en.b7_sub: AUREX Portfolio is a tracking layer, not a trading account. No money moves. No brokerage connection required. Add any of the 350 assets and immediately get the full signal context on your personal mix.
en.b7_f1: AI Risk Thermometer — real-time risk score across your entire portfolio
en.b7_f2: AI Dots — individual signal visible directly on each holding
en.b7_f3: PnL across 5 periods: daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly and annual
en.b7_f4: Multi-currency converter built in. Cloud sync across devices.
en.b8_heading: 15 alert types. You set the rules.
en.b8_ai: Signal change, High Conviction (85–88%), custom probability threshold, signal on Portfolio assets.
en.b8_pulse: Market zone change, alert by asset category, global Risk Thermometer.
en.b8_price: Target price reached, sharp price move, new 52-week high or low.
en.b8_event: FOMC/FED decisions, CPI releases, market open, earnings on Portfolio assets, GDELT geopolitical events.
en.b8_note: Alerts are delivered in-app. Push notifications with app closed, SMS and Telegram delivery — coming in the next version.
en.b9_sub: AUREX runs natively in English, Spanish, Portuguese, Chinese, French, Italian, Hindi and Arabic. Every signal, every disclaimer, every data point — in your language.
en.b9_close: One terminal. 8 languages. 4.2 billion speakers covered.
en.b10_heading: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.
en.b10_free: Up to 5 assets in Portfolio. 3 AI signals per day. Real-time markets. Basic AUREX Pulse. No credit card required.
en.b10_pro: Unlimited AI signals. Unlimited Portfolio. All 15 alert types active. 30-day signal history. All filters and tools. Export to Excel/PDF. Priority support.
en.b10_elite: Everything in PRO, plus: personal API access, live chat support, advanced RSI/MACD, Telegram alerts. Coming soon.
en.b11_disclaimer: AUREX is a data visualization and analytics platform for informational and educational purposes only. It does not provide investment advice, execute transactions, or manage assets of any kind. All analysis is statistical in nature and does not guarantee future results. Always consult a qualified financial professional before making investment decisions. © 2026 AUREX — Fernando Moscón.
